description: Planned and executed source-to-target snapshot copies for the AtomicMemory public monorepo migration. One entry per source-to-target copy. Each entry points to a per-source allowlist under docs/migration/allowlists/. Source commits are recorded at the time the snapshot is planned; initial_monorepo_commit is filled in after the copy lands. Do not preserve git history from source repos. See docs/migration/release-history.md for the provenance contract.
copy_method_default: clean source snapshot, no git history

entries.copy_method: clean source snapshot, no git history
entries.notes: Phase 2 first-wave copy. Old repo retained for history lookup and archived per docs/migration/release-history.md.
